front: Poem: tongue-in-cheek manifesto proposing poems "between two persons rather than two pages"
Poem: asserts "only Whitman and Crane and Williams... are better than the movies"
Poem: tells the title actress "we love you get up" after learning she "has collapsed!"
Poem: declares "there is no snow in Hollywood"
Poem: speaker notes "I am quietly waiting for the catastrophe of my personality to seem beautiful again"
